title: NoBuildPlus
description: A simple plugin to manage the rules of your worlds
body:
![description](https://s2.loli.net/2025/12/21/fcTwIraBpVRdQLe.png)
![acitonbar message](https://s2.loli.net/2024/10/18/MRyoUPkhqmidEWK.png)
![customizable configuration](https://s2.loli.net/2024/10/18/OGdPf7r65LinCWV.png)
![Other's plugins compatibilities](https://s2.loli.net/2024/10/18/tKmfR167egDLlHP.png)

<details>
<summary>Text Introduction</summary>
![INTRODUCTION](https://s2.loli.net/2022/05/05/SZTl8Uhq349OaxP.png)
This is a simple plugin to manage your worlds with flags.
You can set the flags for each worlds.
Flags list:
***Break, Build, Use, Container, Move(Removed at 1.2.8), Mob Damage, Mob Explode, PVP, Shoot,  TNT, TNT Damage, Frame, Bed, VoidTp, Villager, Command, Leaf Decay, Chat, Melt, Fall Damage, Armor Stand, Farm Break, Ride, Painting, Bucket Place, Bucket Fill, Boat, Button, Door Interact, Lever, Trapdoor Interact, Fencegate Interact, (Player) Drop Item, Egg Throw, Snowball Throw, Water Spread, Lava Spread, Fly, (Player) Teleport, Mob Spawn, Minecart, Item Pickup, Potion, Bone Meal, Elytra, Nether, Coral Decay, Fire Spawn, Sign Edit, Dye, Piston, Ice Form, Hook, Fish, Crystal, Flower Pot, Bookshelf Interact, Hunger, Glow Berries Harvesting***
See the description of flags [here](https://github.com/Ez4p1xEL/NoBuildPlus/wiki/NoBuildPlus)
Residence supports!
Dominion supports!
GUI supports from v1.3.6

![image](https://s2.loli.net/2022/05/05/uUyXsbKWqr4mcIf.png)
![image1](https://s2.loli.net/2022/05/04/8j1KTHqbZ6yScYB.png)
![img2](https://s2.loli.net/2022/05/04/HU8EVg4nApfMs5Z.png)
![img3](https://s2.loli.net/2022/05/04/1sqmQ45xbSCRli8.png)
![img4_stepping_farmland](https://s2.loli.net/2022/06/01/U31KrFumjnRXbyZ.png)

![command](https://s2.loli.net/2022/05/05/ON7DV4cgAnZEJ6s.png)
![cmd](https://s2.loli.net/2023/12/31/wg3GiWOa7ZvI9E5.png)
Tab Completer is supported from v1.2.8

![permission](https://s2.loli.net/2022/05/05/9ECMjnVfIWHOQcN.png)
nobuildplus.use To use the commands
nobuildplus.bypass Bypass the flags settings (You can change it for your world)

![usage](https://s2.loli.net/2022/05/05/6bMfDSZUAK5XcBk.png)
Download the jar file and put it into your plugins folder.
1. Start the server.
2. /nbp create <world> Create the world for plugin.
3. /nbp flag <world> <flag> <true/false> modify the settings of the flags.
  3.1 You may also adjust the settings at worlds.yml. Reload the plugin after the adjustments.
  3.2 Remember that true equals to ALLOW while false equals to PREVENT
  3.3 If you want to disable deny-message, you may just delete the whole line of it OR disable it at config.yml
4. Enjoy the plugin features!
5. View the description of each flag [here](https://github.com/Ez4p1xEL/NoBuildPlus/wiki/NoBuildPlus)

</details>

![bstats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/nobuildplus.svg)

Look for support in [Discord](https://discord.gg/UJNAGjuyhS)
